citation: Kataoka, Shin. 2018. 從早期和現代語料看粵語進行體標記「緊」在複句中的功能. Current Research in Chinese Linguistics 97(1):133–141.
source_type: peer-reviewed journal article with reported corpus examples
use: Progressive meaning; exact 睇緊電視, 着緊好靚嘅衫, 買緊樓; objectless 嚟緊 and 病緊; corpus 食緊叉燒包 and 整緊布甸.
limitation: Examples and corpus occurrences do not establish a free verb-by-object cross-product or parser constituency.

citation: Fan, Xiaolei. 2024. 香港粵語「有 VP」的時體意義——兼論普通話的「沒」. Current Research in Chinese Linguistics 103(1):1–30.
locator: pp. 4–8 and 22–23; examples and discussion of dynamic durative VPs, V緊/V住, 有+V緊, and future/modal boundary
use: Exact 唱緊首兒歌 and 食緊飯 examples; dynamic-durative discussion; disputed 有+V緊; one future/modal negative contrast.
limitation: The paper’s theoretical analysis and individual judgments are not adopted wholesale or generalized to all speakers.

citation: Sio, Joanna Ut-Seong, and Francis Bond. 2025. Inner and outer aspect in Cantonese. HPSG 2025.
source_type: peer-reviewed conference abstract/paper with computational analysis
locator: section 1 and section 3.1; outer-aspect inventory and selectional restrictions
use: Confirms need to separate viewpoint aspect from situation type and treat selectional restrictions explicitly.
limitation: The implementation sketch is preliminary and explicitly non-exhaustive.

citation: Alderete, John, Queenie Chan, Macarius Chan, Gloria Fan, and Olivia Nickel. 2017. Cantonese grammar synopsis. Simon Fraser University.
source_type: university grammar synopsis cross-referenced to major grammars
use: Head-final NP summary; possessor-before-head patterns; V-Asp-(NP); general XP coordination with 同埋 and NP coordination example.
limitation: A synopsis is not an exhaustive modern corpus study and uses a non-Jyutping transcription.

citation: Winterstein, Grégoire, et al. 2023. An empirical, corpus-based, approach to Cantonese nominal expressions. PACLIC 37.
use: Treats 啲 di1 as a plural classifier in [CL N]/[NUM CL N] nominal expressions and emphasizes context-conditioned nominal interpretation.
limitation: The paper does not analyze the exact attachment of 啲 + possessor + 嘅 + head strings.

citation: Commission of Inquiry into Excess Lead Found in Drinking Water. Hearing transcript, 2016-01-11.
use: Direct occurrence of 問緊錫條同埋錫線.
limitation: One token; the transcript does not provide pronunciation or constituent analysis.

citation: Independent Review Committee on Hong Kong’s Franchised Bus Service. Hearing transcript, 2018-10-06.
use: Occurrence of 我哋而家就睇緊啲九巴嘅數據 in context discussing KMB data.
limitation: Marked 經傳譯員; orthography and context support occurrence but not unique syntactic bracketing or spontaneous Cantonese production.

citation: Canto Span CP023-P1-PROG01-R2 visible parser observations.
use: Documents current premature closure, missing 同埋 coordination, and whole-object progressive failures.
limitation: Parser output is evidence about implementation behavior, not Cantonese grammar.
